259.reason: [Error: token already contains the initial '|', so appending another "|" duplicates it; should not append extra "|"]

273.reason: [Error: token already contains the initial '&', so appending another "&" duplicates it; should not append extra "&"]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: token already contains the initial '&', so appending another "&" duplicates it; should not append extra "&"]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: token should be just "&" (the original single '&'), but code appends another "&", making it "&&"]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue as with '|': token already contains the first '&', so appending another "&" makes it "&&", which misrepresents the actual erroneous input (which is just a single '&').]

234.reason: [The condition "!isNewLine() || isFinish()" is logically incorrect. It should be "!isNewLine() && !isFinish()" to continue reading until a newline or end of file is reached. As written, the loop may not terminate correctly or skip necessary characters.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition "!isNewLine() || isFinish()" is logically incorrect. It should be "!isNewLine() && !isFinish()" to continue reading until a newline or end of file is reached. As written, the loop may not terminate correctly or skip necessary characters.]
